title: task
description: node_channel.py:63 - send_datagram() uses create_task() without storing the task reference. If node.send() raises an exception, it's logged to asyncio's default handler but otherwise lost. Failure scenario: routing failure or link error goes undetected, makes debugging difficult. Fix: add exception handler callback to the task, or at minimum log errors explicitly.
close_reason: Fixed: Added done callback to create_task() in send_datagram() that logs exceptions via logger.warning, ensuring send failures are no longer silently lost
